nodes.label: AI as quick identification tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable source requiring full verification
nodes.grounding_span: I often use image search to identify a product and rely on the ai generated description to guide further research

nodes.label: AI-generated description accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I verify the data from the ai generated description across multiple sources because that is often not wholly accurate

nodes.label: AI-generated listing descriptions
nodes.grounding_span: I do not use ai to help generate my listing description because it tends to be too wordy

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as time-consuming due to verification overhead
nodes.grounding_span: I could see asking ai to do the further research on pricing and demand for me in the future

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: Without the ai generated description, I have to rely solely on the similar images returned by google, which means clicking on multiple images to find the same information that the description gives me in a fraction of the time

nodes.label: Trustworthiness and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I verify the data from the ai generated description across multiple sources because that is often not wholly accurate

nodes.label: Personal autonomy in listing creation
nodes.grounding_span: I create a short description on my own without the help of ai

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for identification
nodes.grounding_span: I love the ai generated description that my image searches return

nodes.label: Distrust of AI reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I never fully trust the ai generated product description

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI-generated descriptions that need no changes
nodes.grounding_span: I do not use ai to help generate my listing description because it tends to be too wordy

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I could see asking ai to do the further research on pricing and demand for me in the future

nodes.label: Systematic verification through cross-referencing
nodes.grounding_span: I am cross referencing multiple sources

nodes.label: Pragmatic efficiency — uses AI minimally for quick info, avoids over-engagement
nodes.grounding_span: I do not further engage with ai because most often I get enough information from the short description
